hints: storage.go defines core types (Channel, Message, MessageSummary, SyncState) and the sqliteStore struct — start here
channels.go, messages.go, message_summaries.go, syncstate.go are repository implementations that embed/reference sqliteStore
migrations.go is called from storage.go during initialization
This is the most-depended-upon package (7 packages, 62+ inbound calls) — understanding its interface is prerequisite for all other slices
